description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set within a fenced rectangular lot, featuring a flat roof and a clean, geometric architectural style. The property includes a spacious driveway, a garage, and a landscaped front yard with several trees and shrubs. The backyard boasts a swimming pool with a deck area furnished with lounge chairs, as well as additional green space and privacy hedges. Large windows and sliding glass doors are visible, providing ample natural light and a connection between indoor and outdoor living spaces. Two cars are parked on the property, one in the driveway and one near the garage, indicating ample parking. The overall design emphasizes open space, privacy, and a seamless blend of indoor and outdoor environments.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, landscaped yard, driveway, garage, and backyard pool, surrounded by fencing and greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, and landscaped front yard with trees and a car parked near the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, backyard pool area, and a car parked near the garage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard pool, deck with lounge chairs, and large windows opening to the outdoor space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway curving to the entrance, additional trees, and the rear garden area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
